name: Angular
description: Displays the current Angular CLI version when in an Angular project

properties.name: .URL
properties.description: URL of the version info / release notes

properties.name: .Error
properties.description: error encountered when fetching the version string

options.name: tooling
options.description: Tooling to use for fetching version

name: Argo CD
description: Displays the current Argo CD context, server, and user information

properties.name: .Server
properties.description: the server of the current context

properties.name: .User
properties.description: the user of the current context

name: Aspire
description: Synced from upstream docs for the aspire segment.

properties.name: .AppHostPath
properties.description: the resolved AppHost path reported by the Aspire CLI or file search

properties.name: .Version
properties.description: the Aspire Hosting version from Directory.Packages.props

properties.name: .Lang
properties.description: the detected single-file AppHost language (cs or ts)

properties.name: .Running
properties.description: whether the resolved AppHost currently appears in aspire ps

options.name: fetch_running
options.description: query aspire ps to determine whether the resolved AppHost is running

name: Claude Code
description: Displays the current Claude Code session status, model, and token usage

properties.name: .SessionID
properties.description: Unique identifier for the Claude session

properties.name: .ContextWindow.TotalInputTokens
properties.description: Total input tokens used in session

properties.name: .ContextWindow.TotalOutputTokens
properties.description: Total output tokens used in session

properties.name: .ContextWindow.ContextWindowSize
properties.description: Maximum context window size for the model

methods.name: .TokenUsagePercent.Gauge
methods.description: Returns a visual gauge using 5-bar blocks (e.g., ▰▰▰▰▱) to show context window usage

methods.name: .TokenUsagePercent.String
methods.description: Returns the numeric percentage value as a string (e.g., '75')

name: GitHub Copilot
description: Displays GitHub Copilot status, including premium, inline, and chat usage quotas

properties.name: .BillingCycleEnd
properties.description: End date of current billing cycle

methods.name: .Percent.Gauge
methods.description: Returns a visual gauge using 5-bar blocks (e.g., ████░) to show used capacity. Available on .Premium.Percent, .Inline.Percent, and .Chat.Percent

methods.name: .Percent.String
methods.description: Returns the numeric percentage value as a string (e.g., '75'). Available on .Premium.Percent, .Inline.Percent, and .Chat.Percent

methods.name: .Remaining.Gauge
methods.description: Returns a visual gauge using 5-bar blocks (e.g., ░████) to show remaining capacity. Available on .Premium.Remaining, .Inline.Remaining, and .Chat.Remaining

name: GitHub Copilot CLI
description: Synced from upstream docs for the copilot-cli segment.

options.name: gauge_marked_char
options.description: Character used for filled blocks in gauge visualizations

options.name: gauge_unmarked_char
options.description: Character used for empty blocks in gauge visualizations

name: Gradle
description: Synced from upstream docs for the gradle segment.

properties.name: .URL
properties.description: URL of the release notes (from version_url_template)

properties.name: .Error
properties.description: error encountered when fetching the version string

options.name: home_enabled
options.description: display the segment in the HOME folder or not

options.name: cache_duration
options.description: the duration for which the version will be cached. The duration is a string in the format 1h2m3s and is parsed using the [time.ParseDuration] function from the Go standard library. To disable the cache, use none

options.name: missing_command_text
options.description: text to display when the command is missing

options.name: display_mode
options.description: always: the segment is always displayed files: the segment is only displayed when file extensions listed are present context: displays the segment when the environment or files is active

options.name: version_url_template
options.description: a go [text/template][go-text-template] [template][templates] that creates the URL of the version info / release notes

options.name: extensions
options.description: allows to override the default list of file extensions to validate

options.name: folders
options.description: allows to override the list of folder names to validate

options.name: tooling
options.description: the tooling to use for fetching the version
